headline: Partner at Vieta Inc. & Vieta Technologies Inc.

experiences.company: The Out of Home Media Consultancy
experiences.title: Partner
experiences.description: World leading consultancy, working with Landlords, Infrastructure Owners, Media Vendors and Technology Companies, ensuring best value delivery though Out of Home Media Monetization.

experiences.title: CEO
experiences.description: An innovative business leader focused on delivering results in highly competitive environments, with 24 years’ experience in media across the UK and Asia Pacific and with a track record in business transformation. Areas of expertise include •	Strategy formulation, planning and execution •	Sales & Marketing •	Productivity improvement •	Talent identification and development •	Corporate and cultural change My role in Singapore involves the direct strategic oversight of Sales & Marketing, Operations, Development,  Finance and HR, appointed in 2010 to transform the business into Clear Channel’s preeminent business in the Asia Pacific region in terms of revenue growth, profit growth, company culture and industry best practice.

recommendations:
Richard Wentworth-Ping

I've know Adam for 8-10 years, mainly as a client in his CEO roles at Clear Channel. He's such a great leader. Some CEO's just get the idea that you need to invest in people, in a variety of ways and do it consistently over time, not just the "one and we're done" mentality. At every business I have known him at, he's either taken a good operation to become a great operation, or turned things around, culturally and in terms of hard business results. No nonsense but with genuine heart and concern for people. A pleasure to know him.
